ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workspaces" (
  "wc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "local_relpath" TEXT /* Relative path to the workspace within the repository */,
  "op_depth" INTEGER /* Operation depth */,
  "parent_relpath" TEXT /* Relative path to the parent directory */,
  "repos_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the workspace was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the workspace */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the workspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workspace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspaces_repos_id FOREIGN KEY ("repos_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspaces_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repos_path" TEXT /* Path to the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the repository */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the repository is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repos_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision" INTEGER /* Revision number */,
  "presence" TEXT /* Presence status of the file or directory */,
  "moved_here" TEXT /* Relative path from where the file or directory was moved */,
  "moved_to" TEXT /* Relative path to where the file or directory was moved */,
  "kind" TEXT /* Type of the file or directory (file or dir) */,
  "properties" TEXT /* Properties of the file or directory */,
  "depth" TEXT /* Depth of the file or directory in the repository */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file */,
  "symlink_target" TEXT /* Target of the symbolic link */,
  "changed_revision" INTEGER /* Revision number when the file or directory was changed */,
  "changed_date" INTEGER /* Date when the file or directory was changed */,
  "changed_author" TEXT /* Author who made the change */,
  "translated_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file after translation */,
  "last_mod_time" INTEGER /* Last modification time of the file */,
  "dav_cache" TEXT /* DAV cache information */,
  "file_external" TEXT /* External file reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the revision */,
  "message" TEXT /* Commit message for the revision */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Name of the branch where the revision was created */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags associated with the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "wc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workspace */,
  "revision" INTEGER /* Reference to the revision */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, delete, modify) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_author" TEXT /* Author who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the change */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Full path to the file or directory */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Name of the branch where the change was made */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags associated with the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_changes_revision FOREIGN KEY ("revision") REFERENCES revisions ("revision"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_changes_wc_id FOREIGN KEY ("wc_id") REFERENCES workspaces ("wc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "wc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workspace */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file or directory was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the file or directory */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the file or directory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_wc_id FOREIGN KEY ("wc_id") REFERENCES workspaces ("wc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "repos_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the project is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_repos_id FOREIGN KEY ("repos_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repos_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the issue */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the issue is public or private */,
  "comments" TEXT /* JSON array of comments related to the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of labels associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can view */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can edit */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can delete */,
  "can_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can administer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
